antipattern.symptom: mypy output is clean; codebase actually has hundreds of `# type: ignore` comments. Real type errors hide behind them.
antipattern.root-cause: Developers added `# type: ignore` (without a reason) when stubs were incomplete or when they didn't want to fix the error. The ignores accumulated; no audit ever happened.
antipattern.fix: Require a reason comment after every ignore: `# type: ignore[attr-defined] # djangorestframework-stubs lacks SerializerMethodField annotations`. Enable warn_unused_ignores to surface stale ones.

antipattern.symptom: Enabling `mypy --strict apps/` produces 800 errors. Team disables mypy in CI and never re-enables it.
antipattern.root-cause: Repo-wide --strict was flipped at once on a legacy codebase. The "fix everything" project is too big.
antipattern.fix: Use `[tool.mypy.overrides]` to enable strict per module: start with one service module, expand each sprint. Spec strict_files list grows incrementally. Validator forbids strict_files containing every module on day one.

antipattern.symptom: mypy emits spurious errors all over the ORM layer: AnyType errors on Model.objects, missing attrs on settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL.
antipattern.root-cause: mypy_django_plugin is in pyproject.toml plugins but `[tool.django-stubs] django_settings_module = ...` is missing. The plugin can't resolve settings-dependent types.
antipattern.fix: Set django_settings_module = "config.settings.test" (or equivalent). Spec mypy.django_settings_module is required by the validator.

antipattern.symptom: Ruff T20 (no-print) fires on every management command that uses print(). Devs disable T20 globally or add `# noqa: T20` everywhere.
antipattern.root-cause: T20 was added to the global rule set, but management commands legitimately use self.stdout.write or print for one-off scripts.
antipattern.fix: Add per-file-ignore in ruff config: `"apps/*/management/commands/*.py" = ["T20"]`. Convert other print() calls to logger.info.

antipattern.symptom: Each commit takes 45 seconds. Developers add --no-verify; the pre-commit gate is effectively dead.
antipattern.root-cause: MegaLinter or a multi-container linter suite was wired into pre-commit. Container startup alone is several seconds.
antipattern.fix: Pre-commit only runs native tools (ruff, mypy on changed files). MegaLinter / heavy security scans run in CI. Spec rule rejects commit-stage hook with fast=false.
